Title: Intro to Cloud Engineering
Description: An introductory session on Cloud Engineering concepts and best practices. This demo covers fundamental principles of cloud architecture, infrastructure as code, and DevOps workflows.

Title: Advanced Kubernetes Workshop
Description: Deep dive into Kubernetes deployment strategies, service meshes, and observability. Hands-on workshop covering advanced topics in container orchestration.

Title: Security Best Practices
Description: Comprehensive guide to securing cloud infrastructure. Topics include IAM policies, network security, encryption, and compliance frameworks.

Title: Microservices Architecture Patterns
Description: Exploring different microservices patterns including API gateways, saga patterns, and event-driven architectures.

Title: Monitoring and Observability
Description: Introduction to monitoring tools and observability patterns using Prometheus, Grafana, and distributed tracing.

Title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
Description: Learn how to manage cloud infrastructure using Terraform, including modules, state management, and best practices.

Title: CI/CD Pipeline Optimization
Description: Learn how to build efficient CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps. Covers testing strategies, deployment automation, and pipeline performance optimization.

Title: Serverless Architecture on AWS
Description: Hands-on workshop exploring serverless patterns with AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB. Learn event-driven design and cost optimization strategies.

Title: Cloud Cost Optimization Strategies
Description: Discover techniques for reducing cloud expenses while maintaining performance. Topics include resource tagging, rightsizing, and reserved instances.
